programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters take on another Cobbosseecontee camp; Homeowner Walter White and his family dream of a new deck, a natural wood exterior, and an open layout to connect his porch and living room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Converting the first post office ever built in Manchester, Maine, into an off-the-grid cabin.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Hamill family hope that Chase and the Cabin Masters can improve the livability of their rustic 1963 Mount Vernon cabin, which has no kitchen, bathroom or electricity.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters take on another Cobbosseecontee camp; Homeowner Walter White and his family dream of a new deck, a natural wood exterior, and an open layout to connect his porch and living room.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Tree Damage to Lakeside Dream Cabin
programme.desc: The Maine Cabin Masters team faces a challenging cabin restoration after a massive tree damage to a Maine camp; they'll raise ceilings, move the kitchen for lake views, rework the staircase and remove rooms for rustic charm.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark Bowe and his designer Karen Tillery take steps to realize his dream of building a small village of finished antique structures in White Sulphur Springs, West Virginia.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The Barnwood Builders head to Carthage, Maine where they save a barn from the 1840s; as they uncover the craftsmanship of the old New England style barn, they have fun kayaking, canoeing, searching for crawdads and even enjoying some lobster rolls.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: The guys head to West Sunbury, Penn to restore a complex log cabin; it consists of more than 150 parts that must fit together perfectly; Mark looks for the next job, finding one of the best built barns he's ever seen.

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna takes on Southern cooking as she makes crispy fried chicken, garlic mashed potatoes, fresh coleslaw and creamy strawberry pie topped with whipped cream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna prepares a raspberry chipotle pork tenderloin.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna celebrates her love for Italian food by preparing her favorite dishes for a lunch date with Chip, including crispy, warm arancini with homemade marinara sauce, chicken Florentine over pasta and sweet ice cream for dessert.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: A classic meat and potatoes meal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna prepares some of her favorite side dishes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Magnolia Table With Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Joanna elevates a simple, healthy salmon dinner with fresh and flavorful ingredients, complete with a butternut squash spinach salad, light lemon orzo and a smooth panna cotta topped with spiced pear.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Weekend Warriors in the Outer Banks
programme.desc: A couple looks for a family beach getaway in the Outer Banks along the shores of Avon, N.C.; the family of do-it-yourselfers tackles the home's major projects and repurpose as much as they can to keep renovation costs down.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Forever Home in Isle of Palms
programme.desc: A woman is looking for a home in Isle of Palms, S.C., that is close to the beach and has enough space for family and friends; she finds a home that could be perfect, but it needs a lot of work, so she sets out to turn her dream into a reality.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A Maryland couple searches for a beachfront property in Hampton, Va., where they can make seaside memories with their daughters; she looks for ways to cut costs on the renovation without sacrificing style.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: An Unforgettable Renovation on Florida's Forgotten Coast
programme.desc: Despite being engaged with a wedding to plan, Anne and DJ have decided to add more to their plate by purchasing a beach home on the so-called Forgotten Coast of Florida; Anne and DJ plan to take on the majority of the renovation work themselves.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Major Renovation in Gulf Shores
programme.desc: When renovations are halted on a local property in Gulf Shores, Alabama, a couple seeks to transform it into a welcoming home that serves as a getaway for vacationing women.

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: NFL players reach out to Chip and Joanna to help renovate the home for a veteran to make it more accessible for him.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo add a fresh, functional design to a dated ranch home in Waco.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: After being away from Waco, Texas, for six years, Will and Lauren return to raise their two daughters in the house of their dreams.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Fixer Upper
programme.desc: Chip and Jo meet with a client who just purchased a 1950s bungalow hoping to make it her forever home after losing her husband to cancer.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: After experiencing a devastating tornado, a family wants to build an off-grid retreat overlooking Tennessee's Ocoee River; as amateur builders, they must rely on the help of friends and family, and each other, to reach the finish line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliff-side retreat for a family in the Sierra Nevada Mountains; for Gregg and his team, erecting this house in the middle of nowhere comes with its share of challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: From the edge of an active volcano in Hawaii and the Appalachian Mountains to the deserts of New Mexico and upstate New York, builders battle harsh conditions to construct innovative, self-sufficient homes in remote areas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast works to build his dream retirement home in the Idaho mountains, but weather and material shortages slow his timeline.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: These builds bring new meaning to the term middle of nowhere, taking place high on top a sub-zero glacier, miles out in the middle of the Atlantic, deep in Alaska's untamed wilderness, and on a secluded beach off the coast of Belize.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: From the edge of an active volcano in Hawaii and the Appalachian Mountains to the deserts of New Mexico and upstate New York, builders battle harsh conditions to construct innovative, self-sufficient homes in remote areas.

programme.desc: An outdoor enthusiast works to build his dream retirement home in the Idaho mountains, but weather and material shortages slow his timeline.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: These builds bring new meaning to the term middle of nowhere, taking place high on top a sub-zero glacier, miles out in the middle of the Atlantic, deep in Alaska's untamed wilderness, and on a secluded beach off the coast of Belize.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid
programme.desc: Off-the-grid contractor Gregg Smith battles the elements to build a cliff-side retreat for a family in the Sierra Nevada Mountains; for Gregg and his team, erecting this house in the middle of nowhere comes with its share of challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: A unique pre-Civil War cabin is taken apart and restored, highlighting the pioneer craftmanship while adding a contemporary flair.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.sub-title: New Freeport Cabin: The Whole Story
programme.desc: Mark Bowe reveals how "Barnwood Builders" saved a two-story log cabin in New Freeport, Pennsylvania; after saving every log possible, they travel to Albertville, Alabama, to rebuild a home on the edge of a cliff.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders
programme.desc: Mark looks back on some of the most creative ways the team has transformed cabins and barns; from repurposing leftover material to restoring a cabin that looks beyond repair, Mark can always dream up new ways to give old wood a new life.

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Montana-based chef Eduardo Garcia invites his buddies over for some backyard archery practice, followed by a campfire cookout that includes paella, grilled tomatoes, and homemade lavender-honey ice cream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Montana-based Chef Eduardo Garcia spends the day in the kitchen perfecting his Reuben sandwich recipe; it starts with smoked pastrami, homemade sauerkraut and ends with 1000 island dressing and cheese that's piled high on rye bread.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia prepares handmade pappardelle pasta and lamb shank for Becca and Goose.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: It's taco night and friends are coming to dinner; Chef Eduardo Garcia presses tortillas for tostadas, slow-cooks creamy black beans with pork belly, grills a showstopping lobster Aguachile, and drizzles churros with goat caramel for all to share.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Chef Eduardo Garcia brings his sister's crew over for a campfire lunch, featuring a homemade game stock French onion soup topped with griddled swiss, comte and gruyere croutons, as well as campfire crepes with a huckleberry sauce.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Big Sky Kitchen With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: A hearty breakfast at camp is in order before a day on horseback; Chef Eduardo Garcia greets the day and saddles up by the fire, coal-roasting Beet and Sweet Potato hash, and baking Square Bale Biscuits with a creamy Cowboy Hollandaise sauce.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Big Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, R.I., but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: A Big Wow on Alabama's Lake Wedowee
programme.desc: After spending years renting on Lake Wedowee in Alabama, Chris and Jenny are ready to purchase a vacation home for their family.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Big Reno With Astounding Views on Apple Valley Lake in Ohio
programme.desc: Mark and Mary are looking for a lake house that can serve as a meeting place for their large family; they customize an Ohio lakefront home for their large family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.sub-title: Second Generation Renovation on Georgia's Lake Arrowhead
programme.desc: Lisa and Angela are co-workers and friends that are searching for a house with the help of their daughters Daniele and Allie, and are hoping to find the perfect vacation home to share between their two growing families.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: After spending years living all over the world, Teresa and Jeremy find the perfect vacation home for their family in Texas.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: New parents look to escape their busy New York City lives with a move to Wolf Lake, a small, rustic lake community in upstate New York; the properties they consider require significant renovations and may break the bank.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple with renovation know-how is looking for a fixer-upper lake house near Weiss Lake in Alabama, and find a place with hidden problems in the walls and under the floor.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: A couple head back to their favorite spot from their college days to search for a vacation home near Deep Creek Lake, Md.; they're searching for a fixer-upper they can customize with easy lake access.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Agassiz Village provides underprivileged and at-risk kids an opportunity to experience a camp surrounded by the beauty of Maine; with support from the community, Chase and his team take on the big project with a small budget to help the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work; Chase and the team create a working bathroom and kitchen as well as additional sleeping space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Legacy Cabin for a Basketball Legend
programme.desc: The Harringtons purchased a tranquil plot of oceanside property in Phippsburg way back in the 1950s; Joe Harrington, a Maine Basketball Hall of Famer, cleared a parcel so he can construct a camp of his own to add to the family's legacy.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The guys tackle a cabin owned by one of their beloved subcontractors, Florida Nick; his family cabin is in need of some major upgrades; they are looking for more space on the first level and the guys build two cabin additions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Meet the Cannons -- they need a new roof, additional sleeping space and, most importantly, higher ceilings; the Cabin Masters transport a very heavy stone hearth, Jedi and Ashley race to assemble a set of stools, and the guys prank Ashley.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.sub-title: Curtains Up! Theater for Extraordinary Campers
programme.desc: While the team is in Italy, Jedi and Dixie renovate a theater for campers with special needs at Pine Tree Camp in Rome, Maine; it's a transformation from storage space to red carpet reveal as they tackle illness, weather, excavation issues and rot.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The guys tackle a cabin owned by one of their beloved subcontractors, Florida Nick; his family cabin is in need of some major upgrades; they are looking for more space on the first level and the guys build two cabin additions.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Meet the Cannons -- they need a new roof, additional sleeping space and, most importantly, higher ceilings; the Cabin Masters transport a very heavy stone hearth, Jedi and Ashley race to assemble a set of stools, and the guys prank Ashley.
